statusCorrection: M12a was left in BUILDSTATE as in_progress even though live staging voice receipt and local voice tests exist.
webRealityPath: apps/web/src/main.tsx exposes Enable voice, Mic dictation, and assistant TTS playback in the signed-in Job Desk.
Mic dictation writes the captured transcript into the normal Nexi message composer.
Assistant replies call /api/voice/tts only after the operator enables voice.
TTS failures are graceful and do not block normal chat.
part9RealityGate: done for M12a foundation: server TTS route, web voice controls, live staging audio response, and usageLog cost proof are present. M12b full-duplex voice remains separate future scope.
